page_title: aws_secretsmanager_raw function reference
description: The `aws_secretsmanager_raw` function retrieves the raw value of an Amazon Web Services Secrets Manager secret for use in Packer templates.
---

# `aws_secretsmanager_raw` function

`aws_secretsmanager_raw` retrieves the raw value of a secret from Amazon Web
Services (AWS) Secrets Manager.

```hcl
aws_secretsmanager_raw(NAME)
```

The function returns plaintext secrets as strings. For key-value secrets, it
returns the raw JSON value. Use this function when you need the complete secret
value instead of one key.

## Example

```hcl
locals {
  database_credentials = jsondecode(
    aws_secretsmanager_raw("production/database")
  )
}
```

Configure AWS credentials before you call this function. Refer to the
[`aws_secretsmanager`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/contextual/aws_secretsmanager) function reference for supported credential sources.

## Related functions

- [`aws_secretsmanager`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/contextual/aws_secretsmanager) retrieves one key from a key-value secret.
- [`jsondecode`](/packer/docs/templates/hcl_templates/functions/encoding/jsondecode) converts the raw JSON value into an object.
